quality.rationale: 基于静止系物理量定义与四维矢量协变性原理的简洁证明，结构可直接迁移至其他守恒流推导

origin.question: Problem 5.27. Let $s$ , $n$ and $q$ be respectively entropy per baryon, number density of baryons, and heat flux, all measured in the proper frame of the fluid. In this proper frame $q$ is purely spatial. Let $S$ be the entropy density-flux 4-vector. Show that$$\mathbf {S} = \mathbf {n s u} + \mathbf {q} / \mathbf {T},$$where $\mathbf{u}$ is the 4-velocity of the fluid rest frame.
origin.solution: Solution 5.27. In the fluid rest frame$$S^{0} = \text {e n t r o p y d e n s i t y} = \text {n s}$$$$S^{j} = \text {e n t r o p y f l u x} = \text {h e a t f l u x} / T = q^{j} / T.$$Since $\mathbf{q}^0 = 0$ , $\mathbf{u}^0 = \mathbf {1 }$ in the fluid rest frame $\mathbf{S} = \mathbf {nsu} + \mathbf {q} / \mathbf {T }$ is true in the fluid rest frame, and hence in general.
